home.headline:
Hankali tare.
Mafita na gaskiya.
home.subheading: HiveCollective wuri ne inda al'ummomi suke tarawa don suna matsaloli da ke hana su — su gina mafita, tare.

problems.title: Matsaloli
problems.noProblems: Babu matsaloli da aka rubuta tukuna.
problems.beFirst: Ka zama na farko da rubuta ɗaya
problems.signUpToPost: Yi rajista don rubuta matsala ta farko.

problemDetail.noGroups: Babu ƙungiyoyi tukuna — ka zama na farko da shirya game da wannan matsala.
problemDetail.beFirstSolution: Ka zama na farko da ba da shawarar mafita
problemDetail.signUpSolution: Yi rajista don ba da shawarar mafita.

postProblem.title: Rubuta matsala
postProblem.subtitle: Bayyana kalubalen gaskiya da ke shafar al'ummarku, ƙasarku, ko yankinku. Mai da hankali kan matsalolin zamantakewa — ba na sirri ba.
postProblem.titlePlaceholder: misali: Rashin ruwan sha mai tsabta a ƙauyuka
postProblem.descriptionPlaceholder: Bayyana matsala dalla-dalla. Wa yake shafawa? Menene sakamakon? Menene da aka gwada a baya?

postSolution.title: Ba da shawarar mafita
postSolution.subtitle: Bayyana mafitarku a sarari. Menene za a yi, ta wa, kuma ta yaya? Mai da hankali kan matakai na amfani.

auth.joinSubtitle: Ƙirƙiri asusun don rubuta matsaloli, ba da shawarar mafita, kuma shiga ƙungiyoyi.
auth.noAccount: Har yanzu ba ka da asusu?

createGroup.title: Ƙirƙiri ƙungiya
createGroup.subtitle: Ƙungiyoyi suna kawo mutane tare game da wata matsala ta musamman. A matsayinku na mai ƙirƙira, zaku zama mai kula.
createGroup.name: Sunan ƙungiya
createGroup.namePlaceholder: misali: Ƙungiyar Ruwan Sha Mai Tsabta — Ghana
createGroup.descriptionPlaceholder: Menene wannan ƙungiya ke ƙoƙarin cimma? Wa ya kamata ya shiga?

errors.couldNotLoad: Ba a iya lodi wannan matsala ba.
errors.couldNotConnect: Ba a iya haɗa zuwa uwar garke ba.

leaderboard.title: Jerin Mafi Kyau
leaderboard.subtitle: Mafi kyawun masu ba da gudummawa jere bisa jimlar maki na mafita
leaderboard.error: Ba a iya lodi jerin mafi kyau ba.
leaderboard.noContributors: Babu masu ba da gudummawa tukuna.
leaderboard.showing: Ana nuna mafi kyawun masu ba da gudummawa {{count}}

bookmarks.title: Matsalolin da aka ajiye
bookmarks.none: Babu matsaloli da aka ajiye tukuna.
bookmarks.signInPrompt: Shiga don ganin matsalolinka da aka ajiye.

settings.title: Saiti
settings.subtitle: Sarrafa asusunka — canje-canje suna aiki nan da nan.
settings.accountDesc: Sabunta sunan mai amfani da yaren da aka fi so.
settings.usernameHint: Haruffa, lambobi, da layin ƙasa kawai. Haruffa 3–50.
settings.emailHint: Ba a iya canza imel. Tuntuɓi tallafi idan kuna buƙata.
settings.languageHint: Yana sarrafa maɓallan, menu, da alamomi.
settings.passwordDesc: Yi amfani da ƙarfaffar kalmar sirri ta aƙalla haruffa 8.
settings.passwordMismatch: Kalmomin sirri ba su dace ba
settings.passwordUpdated: An sabunta kalmar sirri. Zaman naku na sauran zai kasance har tokeni ɗinsu su ƙare.
settings.notificationsDesc: Zaɓuɓɓukan sanarwa ta imel — za a ƙara nan gaba.
settings.notificationsComing: Sanarwa ta imel za ta bayyana anan bayan an gina wannan fasalin.
settings.deleteDesc: Yana share asusunka, matsalolin da ka rubuta, kuma yana cire ka daga ƙungiyoyi duka. Za a adana mafitarku ba tare da sunanku ba.
settings.deleteWarning: Ba za a iya canza wannan mataki ba. Rubuta sunan mai amfani {{username}} don tabbatarwa.
settings.typeUsername: Rubuta sunan mai amfani don tabbatarwa

admin.title: Allon Mai Gudanarwa
admin.subtitle: Gudanarwa da kula da dandali
admin.signInRequired: Shiga don isa allon mai gudanarwa.
admin.loadError: Ba a iya lodi ƙididdiga ba.
